new_terms.context: PJM rule mechanism to curtail large loads that haven't secured their own capacity.
A formal regulatory step by FERC signaling future rule changes.
Specific Texas legislation regarding power grid curtailment and backup generation.
The structural difference in speed and authority between ERCOT and PJM regulatory frameworks.
The legal power to force large energy users to reduce consumption.
A regulatory mechanism to limit price spikes in capacity auctions.
